name: Hacksmith Industries
oneLine: Kitchener, Ontario engineering studio that builds working real-world versions of fictional movie and game gadgets.
bio: Hacksmith Industries is a Canadian YouTube channel and engineering company founded by James Hobson (born February 10, 1990), an engineering graduate who went full-time on YouTube in late 2015 after a viral pneumatic-exoskeleton video. The studio's signature 'Make It Real' series builds functional replicas of fictional weapons and tools. Hobson holds a Guinness World Record (Dec 2020) for the first retractable proto-plasma lightsaber, which reached around 2,200 C.
style: team-built engineering project series with CNC, welding, and electronics shop footage and a recurring crew
